name: Chocolate Applesauce Cake in a Jar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Place a baking sheet on the middle rack and remove the top rack from the oven.
3. Wash 8 (1 pint) wide mouth canning jars with lids in hot soapy water, then drain, dry, and cool to room temperature.
4. Generously prepare jars with margarine.
5. In a mixing bowl, combine margarine, sugar, eggs, vanilla, almond extract, and applesauce.
6. In another mixing bowl, combine flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
7. Mix the wet ingredients with the dry ingredients just until moistened.
8. Spoon 1 level cupful of batter into each jar.
9. Carefully wipe rims clean, then place jars on the baking sheet (or they'll tip over) in the center of the oven.
10. Bake for 40 minutes. Keep lids in hot water until ready to use.
11. When cakes are done, remove jars from the oven one at a time; they will be hot.
12. If rims need cleaning, use a moistened paper towel.
13. Carefully put lids and rings in place, then screw tops on tightly shut.
14. Place jars on a wire rack; they will seal as they cool.
